visual_summary: A globe component with a centered text label, displayed within a dark mode enabled background with radial gradient. This component can be used as a placeholder or a decorative element.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Globe Demo
Description: A globe component with a centered text label, displayed within a dark mode enabled background with radial gradient. This component can be used as a placeholder or a decorative element.
Style: dark mode, gradient, radial
Interactions: passive, on page load
Tags: decorative, placeholder, illustration

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
